comment: End-to-end fixture: synthetic MFT transcript 6 (8 messages, 8 asks). The routing-humility fixture — exercises the abstain/0/review path no other fixture stresses. Four questions have a clear home and must route confidently; four must NOT be force-bucketed: two off-topic (Confluence down, IBM holiday hours), one genuinely split between two buckets (does a virus-scan failure count against metering), one too vague to place ('Is there a limit?'). The key control is the inverse trap: the 'algorithm negotiation failed' question QUOTES an error but has an unmistakable subject (SFTP connectivity) and must route confidently — an error string is not ambiguity. See mft_test_answer_key_6.md.

message_asks.contains: SFTP connection to a new trading partner

routed_must_match.match: sftp connection to a new|new trading partner
archived or deleted|original (file|get)|file get(s)? (archived|deleted)|when a (scheduled )?transfer moves
